ingredients_text: Mascarpone and Marsala Wine Crème (75%) [Water, Glucose Syrup, Refined Coconut Oil, Mascarpone Full Fat Soft Cheese (Milk) (5%), Sugar, Skimmed Milk Powder, Milk Proteins, Egg Yolk, Egg White, Marsala Wine (2.4%), Ethyl Alcohol (1.3%), Tapioca Starch, Thickener: Agar; Emulsifier: Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids; Stabiliser: Locust Bean Gum; Natural Flavourings], Coffee Syrup (17%) [Water, Glucose Syrup, Ethyl Alcohol (4.9%), Instant Coffee (3.2%)], Sponge (7%) [Eggs, Wheat Flour, Sugar, Dextrose, Emulsifier: Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids; Raising Agents: Diphosphates, Sodium Carbonates], Cocoa Dusting (1%) [Cocoa Powder (46%), Dextrose, Wheat Starch, Sugar, Cocoa Butter].
